name: Maximum Profit in Job Scheduling
description: Given n jobs where each job has a startTime, endTime, and profit, find the maximum profit you can take such that no two jobs in the subset overlap. If you choose a job that ends at time t, you can start another job at time t.
constraints: 1 <= startTime.length == endTime.length == profit.length <= 5 * 10^4. 1 <= startTime[i] < endTime[i] <= 10^9. 1 <= profit[i] <= 10^4.
python_template:

performance.stress_intent: exercise 5k overlapping jobs that punish quadratic or exponential scheduling
